shots.image_prompt: A beautiful young woman in a traditional kimono standing under cherry blossom trees, soft sunlight filtering through pink petals, cinematic lighting, photorealistic, 4K quality
shots.video_prompt: The woman slowly turns her head and smiles gently, cherry blossom petals drifting down around her, soft wind blowing her hair, cinematic slow motion

shots.image_prompt: The same young woman walking through a narrow traditional Kyoto alley with wooden houses, warm afternoon light casting long shadows, photorealistic, 4K quality
shots.video_prompt: The woman walks slowly forward through the alley, sunlight and shadows play across her face, she looks around with curiosity, smooth tracking shot

shots.image_prompt: The same young woman sitting at a traditional Japanese tea house, holding a matcha tea cup, serene garden visible through open sliding doors, photorealistic, 4K quality
shots.video_prompt: The woman lifts the tea cup gracefully, takes a sip, then looks out at the garden with a peaceful expression, gentle steam rising from the cup
